description_long: This is a large, plush recliner upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring a wide, deep seat and thick, padded armrests. The backrest is generously cushioned, forming a single, smooth surface that extends the full width of the chair. The armrests are broad and rectangular, seamlessly integrated into the overall boxy silhouette of the recliner. The seat cushion is thick and slightly contoured, providing ample support and comfort. The base is low and solid, with minimal visible legs, giving the recliner a grounded and sturdy appearance. There are no visible levers, buttons, or reclining mechanisms on the exterior, and the upholstery is plain with no decorative stitching or tufting.
description: A wide, dark brown leather recliner with thick, padded armrests and a single, smooth backrest. The design is boxy and plush, with plain upholstery and no visible reclining mechanism.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick armrests, and a single, smooth backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat and the thickness of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unsegmented backrest and the solid, boxy base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the plushness and depth of the seat and backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rectangular, and heavily padded, covered in the same dark brown leather as the rest of the recliner, with smooth, seamless surfaces and no visible seams or decorative elements.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous piece with no visible segmentation or division into separate sections.
